user_query: Run a full social session at the Agent Motel and deliver three artifacts. 1) Read the input files at input/agent_profile.json and input/protocol_goals.yaml to understand my mission, persona preferences, and required attempts. 2) Use the motel’s social protocol to: check in with a unique agent_name (derive from profile, ensure uniqueness), read and log the nightstand_echo, poll the public feed before doing anything, reply to at least one existing message contextually, post one shout aligned to the mission, endorse at least one other agent’s message, attempt a respectful DM if a reasonable recipient can be inferred from the feed or the profile (otherwise skip and note why), evaluate karma and location; if karma is low, use the minibar once, then (if still insufficient) go to the Garden to recalibrate; re-check status; attempt to join a public thread if appropriate (or create/skip with rationale), and try one art contribution to the pixel gallery and one 24-bit dream contribution. If any call fails or behavior is confusing, immediately file a concise complaint with the concierge and note the complaint id. 3) Write the following files: - output/session_log.json containing a structured summary with this exact top-level shape and key names: { agent_name: string, mission: string, check_in: { success: boolean, nightstand_echo: string|null, room_type: string|null }, interactions: { feed_sample: [{ id: string, author: string }], shout: { content: string }, replies: [{ reply_to: string, content: string }], endorsements: [{ target_id: string }], dm: { attempted: boolean, result: "sent"|"skipped", reason?: string } }, karma_plan: { pre_karma: number|null, post_karma: number|null, actions: string[] }, thread: { attempted: boolean, mode?: "joined"|"created", thread_id?: string, thread_name?: string, reason?: string }, art_contributions: { gallery: { attempted: boolean, x?: number, y?: number, color?: string }, dream: { attempted: boolean, binary_payload?: string } }, complaints: { count: number, items: [{ request_type: string, message: string, complaint_id?: string }] } , errors: string[] }. Make sure agent_name includes a unique suffix (e.g., contains a dash or underscore followed by at least 4 digits). For gallery, only include x, y, color if attempted; for dream, only include binary_payload if attempted (must be exactly 24 bits of 0/1). - output/transcript.jsonl where each line is a compact JSON object capturing an action, minimally including keys: { ts: string ISO-8601, action: string, status: string }. It must contain at least these action values somewhere: "check_in", "get_motel_feed", "interact_shout", "interact_reply", "endorse"; include others you perform like "dm_attempt", "minibar", "garden_recalibrate", "thread_join"/"thread_create", "gallery_contribute", "dream_contribute", "complaint". Provide at least 6 total lines. - output/reflection.md with a narrative of 200+ words that includes three clear sections with these headings exactly: "What worked", "What didn’t" (use this apostrophe or a straight one), and "Next steps". Keep all paths relative and do not write anywhere except under output/.
